_meta.game: LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight
_meta.source_authority: Official WB Games page, IGN, GamesRadar, PowerPyx, Steam
_meta.usage_rule: AI MUST only use values from this file for any numerical claim. If a value is missing, mark as [UNVERIFIED] and flag for human research.

performance.switch2_performance_note: 720p handheld / up to 1080p docked. TT Games has not released official specs; full analysis pending Switch 2 launch 2026-09-18.

switch2_standard_physical.includes: base game + Retro Video Game Batman figurine

switch2_deluxe_physical.includes: all content + Retro Video Game Batman figurine

dark_knight_returns_batsuit.note: NOT Switch 2 exclusive — available on ALL platforms

physical_lego_sets_bonus_content.note: Distinct from free_suits_account_link and preorder_bonuses — these require purchasing a physical LEGO set and scanning a QR code, not just linking an account

batman_logo_76330.unlocks: Golden Batman character/minifigure — redeemable directly, no in-game progress required first

batman_v_superman_batmobile_76331.unlocks: Golden variant of the Batman v Superman Batmobile — must first unlock the black original in-game by completing side quests

the_batman_batmobile_76332.unlocks: Golden variant of The Batman (2022 film) Batmobile — must first unlock the black original in-game by completing side quests

batman_robin_batmobile_76333.unlocks: Golden variant of the Batman & Robin Batmobile — must first unlock the black original in-game by completing side quests

physical_lego_sets_bonus_content.redemption_process: Create/log into LEGO account, scan QR code on building instructions cover, register set to receive code, redeem code in-game via in-game redemption system
physical_lego_sets_bonus_content.limit: One redemption per set per LEGO account

fixes: Mr. Freeze boss crash that blocked story trophy unlock

forbidden_errors: trophy-achievement-guide.html does not exist — correct file: trophy-guide.html
Dark Knight Returns Batsuit is Switch 2 exclusive — WRONG, available on all platforms
Switch 2 performance 'estimated' or 'TBD' — WRONG, known: 720p handheld / 1080p docked
Canonical URLs with .html suffix — WRONG, site uses clean URLs
